description: Defines Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) for officer-facing APIs related to business loan applications, including queue items, application details, decision overrides, and audit events.

classes.name: OfficerDtos
classes.description: Container class for various DTO records used in officer API interactions.

classes.name: OfficerDtos.QueueItem
classes.description: Represents a summarized view of a submitted application in the officer queue.

classes.name: OfficerDtos.ApplicationDetail
classes.description: Provides detailed information about a specific loan application.

classes.name: OfficerDtos.DecisionOverrideRequest
classes.description: Request payload for overriding an automated decision on an application.

classes.name: OfficerDtos.DecisionOverrideResponse
classes.description: Response after applying a decision override.

classes.name: OfficerDtos.AuditEventResponse
classes.description: Represents an audit log event related to officer actions.
